channel.title: SewaKhoj - Trusted Local Services in Nepal
channel.description: Latest news, service updates, and trusted taskers from SewaKhoj - Nepal's #1 Marketplace for services.

item.title: SewaKhoj is now an Installable App (PWA)
item.description: You can now install SewaKhoj directly on your mobile home screen for faster access to plumbers, cleaners, and electricians in Kathmandu.
